raw_spice:
*******************************************************************************
**	DISCLAIMER
*******************************************************************************
**	This model is provided as is, where is, and with no warranty of any kind
**	either expressed or implied, including but not limited to any implied
**	warranties of merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose.
*******************************************************************************

***********************************************************
****	Wolfspeed SiC Schottky diode C6D20065D Spice Library
****	Version 1.0 Date: 06-05-2020
****
***********************************************************
****	Revision record
****	Version 1	Initial Release - Datasheet Rev A, 05-2020
****
*********************************************************************************
.subckt C6D20065D A1 A2 K Case Tj Tc 

.param p11 = -55
.param p12 = 225

R101 Tr 0	1E6
E101 Tr 0 	value {limit(V(Tj),p11,p12)}

**************
*Schottky diode A1
**************
L_anode1	A1	AD1	6n 
RAK1	AD1	K	54E6
xgAK	K	AD14	A1	CAK_C6D10065
D1	AD14	K	CPW6-0650-Z010A temp=25
*Er 	AD13 	AD14	value {(0.0295)*v(net1)}
Er 	AD13 	AD14	value {((665.2n*(V(Tr)**2)+46.972u*V(Tr)+26.554m))*v(net1)}
Eth	AD12	AD13	value {404.95n*(V(Tr)**2)-1.087m*V(Tr)+0.2285}
*Eth	AD12	AD13	value {0.29}
vdiode1	AD1	AD12	0

Esn1	net1	0	value {I(vdiode1)}
Rsn1	net1	0	1E6

R11	Case	K	0.1m
R11p	Case	K	0.1m
R11_p	Case	K	0.1m
***********
*PiN diode A1
***********

D2	AD4	K	PiN_CPW6-0650-Z010A temp=25
*En1	AD3 	AD4	value {19.4}
*En1	AD3 	AD4	value {Limit(-372.89n*(V(Tj)**3)+21.649u*V(Tj)**2-11.029m*V(Tj)+8.6661,1,15)}
En1	AD3 	AD4	value {Limit(-30m*V(Tj)+10.65,1,15)}
Er1	AD2	AD3	value {0.026*v(net2)}
vdiode2	AD1 	AD2	0

Esn2	net2	0	value {I(vdiode2)}
Rsn2	net2	0	1E6

**************
*Schottky diode A2
**************
L_anode2	A2	AD21	6n 
RAK2	AD21	K	54E6
xgAK2	K	AD24	A2	CAK_C6D10065
D3	AD24	K	CPW6-0650-Z010A temp=25
Er3 	AD23 	AD24	value {((665.2n*(V(Tr)**2)+46.972u*V(Tr)+26.554m))*v(net3)}
Eth3	AD22	AD23	value {404.95n*(V(Tr)**2)-1.087m*V(Tr)+0.2285}
vdiode3	AD21	AD22	0

Esn3	net3	0	value {I(vdiode3)}
Rsn3	net3	0	1E6

***********
*PiN diode A2
***********

D4	AD44	K	PiN_CPW6-0650-Z010A temp=25
En4	AD43 	AD44	value {Limit(-30m*V(Tj)+10.65,1,15)}
Er4	AD42	AD43	value {0.026*v(net4)}
vdiode4	AD21 	AD42	0

Esn4	net4	0	value {I(vdiode4)}
Rsn4	net4	0	1E6
**********************************************************
.model CPW6-0650-Z010A d(is=0.88p rs=0 Cjo=0.1p bv=779)
.model PiN_CPW6-0650-Z010A d(is=0.88p rs=0 Cjo=0.1p)

**********************************************************

Gheat	0	Tj	value {abs(V(AD12,K)*v(net1))+abs(V(AD2,K)*v(net2))+abs(V(AD22,K)*v(net3))+abs(V(AD42,K)*v(net4))}

R0 N1 Tj 68.304m
R1 N2 N1 155.649m
R2 N3 N2 721.83m
R3 Tc N3 333.657m

C0 Tj 0 139u
C1 N1 0 543u
C2 N2 0 1.756m
C3 N3 0 34.513m

.ends C6D20065D

.subckt CAK_C6D10065 K AD142 A11

.param Cjo = 850p
.param Vj  = 0.95
.param M   = 0.45

G12 K d1 value {
*+	if(V(K,A11)>0,
+		(Cjo/(1+(limit(v(K,A11),0,450)/Vj)**M))*ddt(v(K,A11));
*+		,
*+		0
*+			)
+			}

R_CDS d1 AD142 1E-4

.ends CAK_C6D10065
